component.name: ZimReader
component.summary: Read offline Wikipedia (ZIM files) with search, themed to match KDE

description.p: A lightweight reader for ZIM files (the offline Wikipedia / Kiwix format). It follows your KDE Plasma light/dark theme, renders articles in a web view, and has a search bar with live title suggestions and full-text search.
First version: open ZIMs, search, KDE light/dark theming.
